extractedSignals.title: Conteudo bruto de captura removido. Use apenas os sinais sintetizados deste design system.
sourceText: For Companies Facing Heated Challenges.
For Companies Facing Heated Challenges.
Bick Law LLP is comprised of an experienced team of lawyers who offer progressive solutions to businesses facing complex environmental challenges.
View Bio Sheila Mojtehedi Counsel Sheila Mojtehedi is a commercial litigator with experience in state and federal courts.
View Bio Tyler Alexander Senior Associate Tyler Alexander joins Bick Law LLP after serving for 7 years as a Trial Attorney in the U.S.
Department of Justice’s Environment and Natural Resources Division (ENRD) in Washington, D.C.
View Bio Alan Bick Partner Alan is a pre-eminent environmental lawyer with over 25 years of experience.
View Bio Sheila Mojtehedi Counsel Sheila Mojtehedi is a commercial litigator with experience in state and federal courts.
View Bio Tyler Alexander Senior Associate Tyler Alexander joins Bick Law LLP after serving for 7 years as a Trial Attorney in the U.S.
Department of Justice’s Environment and Natural Resources Division (ENRD) in Washington, D.C.
View Bio Alan Bick Partner Alan is a pre-eminent environmental lawyer with over 25 years of experience.
View Bio Sheila Mojtehedi Counsel Sheila Mojtehedi is a commercial litigator with experience in state and federal courts.
View Bio Tyler Alexander Senior Associate Tyler Alexander joins Bick Law LLP after serving for 7 years as a Trial Attorney in the U.S.
Department of Justice’s Environment and Natural Resources Division (ENRD) in Washington, D.C.
Kim is additionally affable, cooperative, and great at client communication, making her a vital asset throughout the transactional process.
It was a pleasure to work with Kim and I highly recommend her services to anyone needing environmental counsel.
We engaged Bick Law LLP to represent us in connection with a Proposition 65 matter.
From the outset, their team demonstrated exceptional legal expertise, professionalism, and diligence.
They guided us through a complex regulatory process with clarity and strategic insight, ensuring our interests were well protected at every stage.
Communication was prompt, thorough, and thoughtful throughout the engagement.
We are very satisfied with the outcome and would not hesitate to recommend Bick Law LLP to others seeking legal representation in this area.
Hang / Pac-Dent, Inc.
Initially unfamiliar with the firm, I quickly recognized their unique value proposition.
Their detailed budget, a rarity among law firms, aligned perfectly with our desired outcome.
The work product rivaled Big Law’s polish and expertise, but came at a lower cost, delivering exceptional value.
At the mediation, their thorough preparation shone through, leading to a settlement that exceeded all expectations.
I wholeheartedly recommend Kim, Corrie, and Bick Law Firm for their expertise and client-focused approach.
- Kate Winders, Former General Counsel - Global Litigation, Technicolor Group We received a prop 65 notice for one of our products.
We were referred to Bick Law by another lawyer we had worked with.
We contacted Bick Law and were connected with Corrie Plant.
Plant spent time learning about our products, explaining the applicable CA Prop 65 requirements and offering options to resolve the matter.
Corrie then contacted the law firm who sent the Prop 65 notice.
Following negotiations, the law firm agreed to resolve the matter.
Corrie was very professional, knowledgeable and easy to work with.
Bick Law LLP provides expert advice to companies who are seeking assistance with California Prop 65 requirements.
I have worked with Kim Bick for several years regarding the sale of a wood preserving site.
Most importantly, Kim has always told me what I needed to hear, not what I wanted to hear.
In addition, unlike other attorney's whom I have worked with, she is always available to meet deadlines after hours, weekends ,and holiday.
Kim is additionally affable, cooperative, and great at client communication, making her a vital asset throughout the transactional process.
It was a pleasure to work with Kim and I highly recommend her services to anyone needing environmental counsel.
We engaged Bick Law LLP to represent us in connection with a Proposition 65 matter.
From the outset, their team demonstrated exceptional legal expertise, professionalism, and diligence.
They guided us through a complex regulatory process with clarity and strategic insight, ensuring our interests were well protected at every stage.
Communication was prompt, thorough, and thoughtful throughout the engagement.
We are very satisfied with the outcome and would not hesitate to recommend Bick Law LLP to others seeking legal representation in this area.
Hang / Pac-Dent, Inc.
Initially unfamiliar with the firm, I quickly recognized their unique value proposition.
Their detailed budget, a rarity among law firms, aligned perfectly with our desired outcome.
The work product rivaled Big Law’s polish and expertise, but came at a lower cost, delivering exceptional value.
At the mediation, their thorough preparation shone through, leading to a settlement that exceeded all expectations.
I wholeheartedly recommend Kim, Corrie, and Bick Law Firm for their expertise and client-focused approach.
- Kate Winders, Former General Counsel - Global Litigation, Technicolor Group We received a prop 65 notice for one of our products.
We were referred to Bick Law by another lawyer we had worked with.
We contacted Bick Law and were connected with Corrie Plant.
Plant spent time learning about our products, explaining the applicable CA Prop 65 requirements and offering options to resolve the matter.
Corrie then contacted the law firm who sent the Prop 65 notice.
Following negotiations, the law firm agreed to resolve the matter.
Corrie was very professional, knowledgeable and easy to work with.
Bick Law LLP provides expert advice to companies who are seeking assistance with California Prop 65 requirements.
I have worked with Kim Bick for several years regarding the sale of a wood preserving site.
Most importantly, Kim has always told me what I needed to hear, not what I wanted to hear.
In addition, unlike other attorney's whom I have worked with, she is always available to meet deadlines after hours, weekends ,and holiday.
Kim is additionally affable, cooperative, and great at client communication, making her a vital asset throughout the transactional process.
It was a pleasure to work with Kim and I highly recommend her services to anyone needing environmental counsel.
Business Focus Bick Law is an environmental law firm focused exclusively on meeting the needs of business clients.
Client-Centered Solutions Bick Law strives to find the best solutions to our clients’ environmental challenges and problems.
Our attorneys have a full understanding of our clients’ businesses and the complex industries in which they operate.
Flexible and Cost-Efficient Bick Law prides itself on its ability to deliver top-tier environmental law services in a highly cost-efficient manner.
Our deep experience allows us to handle difficult and complex legal matters nimbly and efficiently.
Collaborative Approach Collaborating with our clients, their consultants, and co-counsel is a top priority.
Diversity Bick Law is a woman owned law firm and has been approved by Supplier Clearinghouse as a Women Business Enterprise.
Diversity and inclusion is a core value in our firm’s mission and strategic vision.

designIntent.summary: Referencia juridica sofisticada com contraste forte, simbolos visuais, prova de impacto e composicao editorial.
designIntent.hero: Impacto juridico com contraste editorial e prova visual.
designIntent.nonGoal: Nao e DS final do cliente; nao contem fluxo real de formulario.

gradients.name: Case Glow
gradients.value: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 18%, rgba(183,153,83,.28), transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 70%, rgba(140,45,36,.18), transparent 42%)

semantic.contrastIntent: AA minimum for body text; generated preview overrides --c2 as light surface and --c3 as dark text to avoid low-contrast sections.

contextualUsageRules.text: Usar token semantico com contraste AA.
contextualUsageRules.background: Usar surface/background conforme personalidade do site.

fontFamilies.loading: local when available; fallback stack otherwise

icons.rule: icone nao desloca layout no hover

case-study-split.visual: Referencia Bick Law LLP: juridico premium / ousado / ambiental

impact-stat.visual: Referencia Bick Law LLP: juridico premium / ousado / ambiental

verdict-modal.visual: Referencia Bick Law LLP: juridico premium / ousado / ambiental

sharp-nav.visual: Referencia Bick Law LLP: juridico premium / ousado / ambiental

quote-panel.visual: Referencia Bick Law LLP: juridico premium / ousado / ambiental

motion.parallax: limited scroll response with reduced-motion fallback

accessibility.contrast: AA minimo; overlay obrigatorio sobre imagem

risks: Preto dominante exige respiro e texto Ivory.

rules: Hero full viewport com composicao escura e objeto/animal como assinatura.
Menu deve ser assertivo: cases, team, practice, impact.
Stats e quotes entram como prova, nao decoracao.
Motion usa cortes e masks, sem parecer agressivo demais.

menuSystem.note: Menu juridico editorial: links grandes, statement e prova de autoridade.
menuSystem.behavior: overlay flyout, Esc closes, link closes

referenceUsage.purpose: Insumo de advocacia premium com personalidade forte. O DS final decide tom juridico conforme briefing do cliente.
nonGoals: nao criar DS final do cliente
nao usar padrao generico para todos os sites
differentiationRules: Hero full viewport com composicao escura e objeto/animal como assinatura.
Menu deve ser assertivo: cases, team, practice, impact.
Stats e quotes entram como prova, nao decoracao.
Motion usa cortes e masks, sem parecer agressivo demais.
referenceUsage.qualityRule: Preview precisa demonstrar personalidade do site extraido, com menu completo, hero, tokens, gradientes, tipo, efeitos, componentes, cards/secoes, story parallax, icones, handoff e motion linkados.

globalTokens.radius: 0-10px conforme referencia; cards ate 8px salvo marcas arredondadas
